_comment: CWE → compliance control mapping (PRD §10). Code-level control coverage ONLY — never certification. Control IDs marked in _verify need a human/standards confirmation before launch.
_verify: VERIFIED 2026-06-21: NIST CSF 2.0 subcategories PR.DS-01/02, PR.AA-05, PR.PS-06, ID.RA-01 all confirmed verbatim against the official CSF 2.0 Core (nist.gov).

VERIFIED 2026-06-21: SOC 2 TSC points CC6.1/6.6/6.7, CC7.1 (vuln detection, distinct from CC7.2 anomaly monitoring), CC8.1 all confirmed against the 2017 TSC. Verbatim wording cross-checked via audit-firm references, not the paywalled AICPA PDF.

CORRECTED 2026-06-21: CIS v8.1 — 16.6 was WRONG (it is the app-vuln severity-rating safeguard, not authorization) -> remapped access/authz to 16.10 (Apply Secure Design Principles). 16.11 mislabeled (Leverage Vetted Modules) -> remapped credential/code defects to 16.12 (Code-Level Security Checks). 2.1 relabeled to Software Inventory (SBOM is not part of 2.1; SBOM ~ 16.4). 16.1/7.1/3.10/3.11 confirmed.

ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls (A.8.28 secure coding etc., from PRD §10.1) are grounded. OWASP CWE->category links are grounded, but the numeric MITRE View IDs (1346/1347/1353 etc.) are NOT independently verified — consistent with _note and the OWASP-Web source_citations.

SME REVIEW STILL RECOMMENDED before launch: which control a given CWE maps to is a judgment call; a compliance SME should sign off on the cwe->control table even though every ID is now confirmed to exist.

CIS_v8.1.name: Establish and maintain a secure application development process
Apply secure design principles in application architectures
Establish and maintain a vulnerability management process
Establish and maintain a software inventory

EssentialEight.name: Patch Applications (the only meaningfully code-evidenced E8 mitigation)

owasp_web_all_views._note: OWASP Top 10 2021 -> CWE View ID table. These numeric MITRE View IDs (1345-1349, 1352-1356) are NOT independently verified (cwe.mitre.org could not be confirmed in-session; consistent with the PRD and COMPLIANCE-RATIONALE.md). The CWE->OWASP CATEGORY links are firm; the numeric View IDs are retained for reference only and must not be asserted as verified.

ISO27001:2022.rationale: Hardcoded credential is a secrets-management issue, not a cryptographic-algorithm one. Partial indicator only - not standalone audit evidence; community review welcome.
ISO27001:2022.reviewer: Synvoya maintainer (security analyst) - policy-reviewed, AI-drafted + 2-model cross-checked, 2026-06-24
Synvoya maintainer (security analyst) - policy-reviewed, AI-drafted + 2-model cross-checked, 2026-06-24
